## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm pack:check`
- [ ] `pnpm template:check`

## Release

- [ ] Added a Changeset for user-visible package changes
- [ ] Updated documentation or examples where needed
- [ ] Confirmed no secrets, generated storage, or private data are included
